1.0.2.title: Test Release
changes: This is a test release to verify the in-panel auto-update system.

1.0.1.title: Local Changelog Feed & UI Enhancements
changes: Added local changelogs.json support with filesystem reading.
Optimized changelog page loading speed via native GET endpoint.
Implemented one-time popup modal alerts after version updates.
Added dedicated Changelog history timeline under profile settings.

1.0.0.title: Panel Self-Updater & Fixes
changes: Integrated self-updating feature using Docker socket.
Added local Windows mount path resolution auto-detection.
Implemented monaco editor callback caching to fix scroll refreshing bugs.
Added dashboard version and update status badge.
